signals.headline: South Korea's March 2026 annual inflation rose to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's March 2026 annual inflation rose to 2.2% YoY (from 2.0% in February), undershooting market consensus of 2.3-2.4% due to government fuel caps offsetting oil price surges.**[1][2][3] | **NO** | **HIGH** confidence
